gregor_samsa.name: Gregor Samsa
gregor_samsa.ghost: Years of self-sacrifice as family breadwinner; suppressed resentment at exploitation
gregor_samsa.want: To continue providing for his family and pay off his father's debt
gregor_samsa.need: To recognize his worth beyond economic utility; to be loved for himself
gregor_samsa.flaw: Complete self-abnegation; inability to assert his own needs

grete_samsa.name: Grete Samsa
grete_samsa.ghost: Childhood dependence on Gregor's financial support
grete_samsa.want: To care for and eventually cure her brother
grete_samsa.need: To establish her own identity independent of Gregor's sacrifice
grete_samsa.flaw: Compassion fatigue; eventual prioritization of self over brother

mr_samsa.name: Mr. Samsa
mr_samsa.ghost: Business failure that indebted the family to Gregor's employer
mr_samsa.want: To restore family honor and regain patriarchal authority
mr_samsa.need: To acknowledge his debt to Gregor; to show gratitude
mr_samsa.flaw: Violent assertion of authority; cannot tolerate role reversal

mrs_samsa.name: Mrs. Samsa
mrs_samsa.ghost: Chronic illness and dependence on others
mrs_samsa.want: To see her son restored; to maintain family unity
mrs_samsa.flaw: Physical weakness; denial; inability to act

chief_clerk.name: the Chief Clerk
chief_clerk.want: To retrieve Gregor for work; to enforce institutional obligation
chief_clerk.flaw: Institutional dehumanization; cannot see person behind worker

middle_lodger.name: the Middle Lodger
middle_lodger.flaw: Disgust at the Other; representative of bourgeois intolerance

relationships.description: Gregor's beloved younger sister; recipient of his sacrifice; initially his caregiver
Father-son relationship inverted by economic dependency
Mother who loves but cannot face transformed son
United in crisis but divided on how to handle Gregor
Daughter who ultimately aligns with father's rejection

gregor_room.name: Gregor's Room
gregor_room.general_vibe: Increasingly bare and prison-like as furniture removed
sensory_signature: picture of woman in furs on wall

living_room.name: the Living Room
living_room.general_vibe: Center of family life from which Gregor is excluded

family_flat.name: the Family Flat
family_flat.general_vibe: Cramped city apartment; increasingly commercialized as lodgers invade
